query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_blocked,
  SUM(CASE WHEN linkedin IS NOT NULL AND linkedin != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_linkedin,
  SUM(CASE WHEN linkedin IS NULL OR linkedin = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_linkedin
FROM contacts
WHERE 
  contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
  AND (
    -- Single letter last name pattern: "First L." or "First M. L."
    name REGEXP '^[A-Za-z]+ [A-Z]\\.$'
    OR name REGEXP '^[A-Za-z]+ [A-Z]\\. [A-Z]\\.$'
  )
LIMIT 1
